name: AK-47 | 黄金藤蔓
collection: 2021 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
collectionZh: 2021 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. An intricate design has been hand painted on the stock and handguard. The metal has been painted gold with filigree accents. \"What other tricks does Booth have up his sleeve?\"
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 这把武器的握把和护木上绘有复杂的图案。枪身的金属已涂成了金色并有花纹点缀。 “布兹还会有什么招数？”
